'''noshayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:gymnasic|gymnasic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gymnasic|gymnasic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| noshayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:noshayithi|noshayithi]] || [[word:noshayiji|noshayiji]] || [[word:noshayishi|noshayishi]] || [[word:noshayiki|noshayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:noshayuthuthu|noshayuthuthu]] || [[word:noshayujuju|noshayujuju]] || [[word:noshayushushu|noshayushushu]] || [[word:noshayukuku|noshayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:noshayuthu|noshayuthu]] || [[word:noshayuju|noshayuju]] || [[word:noshayushu|noshayushu]] || [[word:noshayuku|noshayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:noshayufthuf|noshayufthuf]] || [[word:noshayufjuf|noshayufjuf]] || [[word:noshayufshuf|noshayufshuf]] || [[word:noshayufkuf|noshayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:noshayethe|noshayethe]] || [[word:noshayeje|noshayeje]] || [[word:noshayeshe|noshayeshe]] || [[word:noshayeke|noshayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:noshayothotho|noshayothotho]] || [[word:noshayojojo|noshayojojo]] || [[word:noshayoshosho|noshayoshosho]] || [[word:noshayokoko|noshayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:noshayotho|noshayotho]] || [[word:noshayojo|noshayojo]] || [[word:noshayosho|noshayosho]] || [[word:noshayoko|noshayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:noshayofthof|noshayofthof]] || [[word:noshayofjof|noshayofjof]] || [[word:noshayofshof|noshayofshof]] || [[word:noshayofkof|noshayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfthĂŻf|noshayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfjĂŻf|noshayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfshĂŻf|noshayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfkĂŻf|noshayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|noshayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|noshayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|noshayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|noshayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfthĂŻf|noshayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfjĂŻf|noshayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfshĂŻf|noshayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfkĂŻf|noshayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfthĂŻf|noshayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfjĂŻf|noshayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfshĂŻf|noshayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:noshayĂŻfkĂŻf|noshayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:noshayĂŠthĂŠ|noshayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:noshayĂŠjĂŠ|noshayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:noshayĂŠshĂŠ|noshayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:noshayĂŠkĂŠ|noshayĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:noshayathatha|noshayathatha]] || [[word:noshayajaja|noshayajaja]] || [[word:noshayashasha|noshayashasha]] || [[word:noshayakaka|noshayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:noshayatha|noshayatha]] || [[word:noshayaja|noshayaja]] || [[word:noshayasha|noshayasha]] || [[word:noshayaka|noshayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:noshayafthaf|noshayafthaf]] || [[word:noshayafjaf|noshayafjaf]] || [[word:noshayafshaf|noshayafshaf]] || [[word:noshayafkaf|noshayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:noshayasha|noshayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:noshayshĂ«asha|noshayshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noshayroasha|noshayroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noshaymuasha|noshaymuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:noshayyaasha|noshayyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoshaynkshĂ«asha|gonoshaynkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoshaynkroasha|gonoshaynkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoshaynkmuasha|gonoshaynkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoshaynkyaasha|gonoshaynkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:noshashayasha|noshashayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:noshashayshĂ«asha|noshashayshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noshashayroasha|noshashayroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noshashaymuasha|noshashaymuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:noshashayyaasha|noshashayyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoshashaynkshĂ«asha|gonoshashaynkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoshashaynkroasha|gonoshashaynkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoshashaynkmuasha|gonoshashaynkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoshashaynkyaasha|gonoshashaynkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:neshĂŠyasha|neshĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:neshĂŠyshĂ«asha|neshĂŠyshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:neshĂŠyroasha|neshĂŠyroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:neshĂŠymuasha|neshĂŠymuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:neshĂŠyyaasha|neshĂŠyyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goneshĂŠynkshĂ«asha|goneshĂŠynkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goneshĂŠynkroasha|goneshĂŠynkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goneshĂŠynkmuasha|goneshĂŠynkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goneshĂŠynkyaasha|goneshĂŠynkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:noshfayasha|noshfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:noshfayshĂ«asha|noshfayshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noshfayroasha|noshfayroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noshfaymuasha|noshfaymuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:noshfayyaasha|noshfayyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoshfaynkshĂ«asha|gonoshfaynkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoshfaynkroasha|gonoshfaynkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoshfaynkmuasha|gonoshfaynkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoshfaynkyaasha|gonoshfaynkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
